prompt: Create an ultra-wide cinematic anime fantasy battle scene in a dark ruined volcanic battlefield at night, aspect ratio about 2.4:1. Show exactly two female warriors clashing in midair among jagged black rocks, smoke, sparks, embers, and distant fires. On the left, a fierce red-haired fire knight with long windblown crimson hair, ornate gold plate armor, a flowing burgundy cape and skirt cloth, lunging forward with a glowing orange fire sword and a swirling flame aura behind her. On the right, a silver-haired ice warrior with very long flowing silver-white hair, glossy black-and-white battle armor with blue crystal accents, crouching and bracing with one arm extended; place a flat dark gray square censor block over her face. Between them, render a large circular blue magic shield sigil made of intricate glowing runes and geometric rings, struck by the fire blade with bright orange sparks at the impact point. Add exactly two elemental effects: orange fire around the left warrior and blue ice crystals around the right warrior, including sharp translucent shards bursting outward behind her. Use high-detail Japanese anime key visual style, dramatic rim lighting, dynamic perspective, sharp linework, painterly rendering, intense motion, high contrast orange-and-cyan color grading, cinematic depth of field, no text, no watermark.
